sources.google: official Google AI Gemini API pricing (verified 2026-06-01, ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/pricing)

note: USD per 1,000,000 tokens. Only models reachable via the current router/config/fallback are listed (OpenAI + Google = the two API-billed providers the audit found reporting cost_estimate=0.0; Anthropic reports real SDK cost and is intentionally absent). cached_input is recorded for reference but NOT used in estimation: the usage dicts do not yet separate cached tokens, so the estimate charges the full input rate = conservative (never under-bills the cost gates). gemini-2.5-pro is context-tiered: prompts over input_token_threshold use the 'above' rates.
